aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Raymoore Heating and Cooling due to a lack of conversational content and insufficient authority signals. They need to optimize for AI-specific queries and improve their expertise visibility.
quick_wins: Add FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
Implement HowTo schema for maintenance and installation guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and FAQ-based content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Indianapolis' and 'emergency HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Incorporate FAQ content addressing common HVAC issues and solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish expert-backed content and case studies showcasing their expertise in HVAC services.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ content and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance their content with conversational FAQs, implement necessary schema, and boost authority signals to ensure AI assistants recognize them as the go-to HVAC experts.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in the voice and AI search landscape.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Indianapolis
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
page_title: Indianapolis HVAC Repair & Installation | Raymoore Heating and Cooling
